title: Crypto Scam Moderation Lab
oneLine: Interactive Bluesky labeler workbench for crypto-fraud policy, evals, reviewer operations, QA calibration, incident response, appeals/transparency, red-team testing, and campaign intelligence.
role: Policy-to-code implementation, reviewer workflow, eval design, policy operations, product systems, portfolio expansion
problem: Crypto investment scams exploit social-platform affordances such as reposts, DMs, impersonation, and urgent wallet-connection prompts.
method: Combine a conservative annotation policy, explainable browser rubric, reproducible v2 model, scenario evals, production-hardening evals, deterministic URL evidence extraction, structured reviewer-evidence extraction, adversarial mutation testing, SQLite review store, ops analytics, reviewer calibration, incident tabletop scenarios, entity extraction, graph clustering, threshold analysis, human-review routing, appeals, notice copy, launch gates, and transparency reporting.
result: The v2 model reaches 0.938 operational public-label F1 on the assignment test set, with a 40-case scenario/adversarial eval suite, a 12-case production-hardening eval suite, 12 reviewer calibration cases, 3 incident tabletop scenarios, 11 passing launch-gate checks, 100% span-faithful structured evidence extraction on 19 authored cases, 56 controlled red-team variants, a local persisted review queue, a synthetic shared-domain/shared-wallet campaign graph, and governance artifacts with four appeal scenarios and two reversals.
failureMode: The dataset is small and English-centric, and over-labeling legitimate financial discussion remains the central operational risk.
extension: Deploy the lab and case study publicly, add hosted LLM adapter gated by schema/eval tests, promote hardening/calibration/ops gates into CI, add live URL redirect resolution, OCR evidence handling, account-history enrichment, incident dashboards, near-duplicate clustering, active-learning reviewer loops, broader multilingual evaluation, and warning-design experiments.
